ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Continued To Aug-29-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Sidney Sheray, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Farid Jaawani and Speck Cab Company dba Arrow Cab.
Plaintiff's Witness: Farid Jaawani and Tyler Speck were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, and matter submitted.
The Court taken the matter under submission for review, proposed Judgment received in court.

P.M.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Cynthia Amaya as follows:
Total Damages $12,063.27
Loss of use $183.00
Costs $417.00, for the Total of $12,663.27
See scanned doc. for break-down of Judgment.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
